mapper.select: select user_id,identifier,user_name,email,role,status,avatar,gender,birthday,signature, created_at,updated_at from user where email = #{email} and password = #{password}
mapper.update:
update user
user_name = #{userName},
role = #{role},
status = #{status},
avatar = #{avatar},
gender = #{gender},
birthday = #{birthday},
signature = #{signature}
where user_id = #{userId}
